notes: This is the shared repo-wide event name library.
Not every event in this file is used by every task.
Per-session event_code_library.json files contain the minimal subset of event names, codes, event types, and descriptions actually used in that run.
Indexed active_foraging sequential events are defined through templates so option_{n}_dot and option_{n}_on do not need to be duplicated as static entries.

gray_pre_sequence.description: Gray pre-sequence screen before the first stimulus appears.

stimulus_on.description: A stimulus became visible on the main display.

gray_inter_stimulus.description: Gray inter-stimulus screen after a stimulus was removed.

gray_final_fixation.description: Final gray fixation screen after the image sequence completed.

block_cue.description: Block-start fixation or cue screen before the first stimulus in the block.

stimulus_dot.description: Pre-stimulus dot cue indicating the next stimulus location.

choice_start.description: The response window opened and a choice could first be made.

gray_inter_trial_interval.description: The display transitioned to the gray between-trial or between-block interval.

onset_cue_on.description: The self-initiation onset cue became visible.

grey_inter_trial_interval.description: The display transitioned to the gray post-choice or inter-trial interval.

options_dot.description: Dot cues for all options became visible simultaneously.

options_on.description: Stimuli for all options became visible simultaneously.

video_clip_start.description: A video clip became visible on the main display.

video_clip_end.description: The display transitioned away from the video clip.

delay_start.description: The delay period began after cue offset and before choices appeared.

cue_touch.description: A touch or click was registered on the self-initiation cue.

option_touch.description: A touch or click was registered on a selectable option.

active_foraging_option_dot.description_template: Dot cue for option {option_index} became visible.
